provenance.notes: Authoritative ordinary-client allow set mirrored from routeclass.Inventory(). Each method+pathTemplate is exactly one inventory rule expansion. Classifier matches the same inventory (no runtime JSON parsing). Evidence refs retained from prior curation where present. Not generated from OpenAPI. Denied: global /Items, Shows Episodes/Seasons, HideFromResume, ScheduledTasks, generic filenames, admin families.

Official inventory GET /Videos/{Id}/hls/{PlaylistId}/{SegmentId}.{SegmentContainer}. Exact 5-segment depth. Compatibility decision.
Executable m3u8 rewrite produces /Videos/{id}/hls/seg0.ts (server_test). Exact 4-segment depth; segment container allowlist ts/m4s/mp4/aac/vtt. Compatibility decision.
Official inventory GET/HEAD /Videos/{Id}/hls1/{PlaylistId}/{SegmentId}.{SegmentContainer}. Compatibility decision.
Official inventory HEAD/GET hls1 segment family (paired with hls). Exact depth + container allowlist. Compatibility decision.
Official inventory GET /Videos/{Id}/main.m3u8 (paired with master). Compatibility decision for forced-HLS family.
Executable: TestGatewayMVPTokenMappingAndRewriting, TestCookieOnlyManifestAndChildrenDoNotExposeTokens, proxy_failure m3u8 matrix. Official GET/HEAD /Videos/{Id}/master.m3u8. Compatibility decision.

Executable: media_upstream_test, resource_cookie_test, server_test stream/m3u8 rewrite, media_buffer tests. Official GET/HEAD /Videos/{Id}/stream. Maintained-client pin (plugin.video.emby) direct stream family. Compatibility decision (not stable-Web observed).
Official inventory GET/HEAD /Videos/{Id}/stream.{Container}. Classifier allowlists finite container set (ts/mp4/mkv/…). Compatibility decision; not arbitrary StreamFileName.
Official inventory GET/HEAD Videos subtitle Stream.{Format}. Numeric Index; finite format allowlist. Compatibility decision (not stable-Web observed).
Official inventory Videos subtitle with StartPositionTicks. Compatibility decision.
